headline: Toledo Yacht Club faces June 10 sheriff's sale — 160-year-old Point Place landmark defaulted on loan as community rallies
paragraphs: The historic Toledo Yacht Club — a 160-plus-year-old waterfront landmark in Toledo's Point Place neighborhood — is scheduled for a Lucas County Sheriff's sale on June 10, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. via RealAuction. A January 2026 court judgment found the club defaulted on a 2015 commercial promissory note with Croghan Colonial Bank (originally $350,000), leaving an outstanding balance of approximately $263,164 plus 8.25% default interest accruing since 2023. The Lucas County Sheriff's Office received the Order of Sale in April; an appraisal of the property has already been completed.

The club is navigating compounding structural deterioration — roof replacement, dock repairs, stucco and exterior restoration, window replacement, and HVAC upgrades are all needed — alongside the financial default. WTOL's community-focused coverage found north Toledo residents and Councilmember Theresa Morris rallying around the club: 'It's just devastating for our community,' Morris said. Under the sale terms, the auction can be halted if the debt is paid or a settlement is reached before June 10. 13abc and WTOL first reported the situation in May 2026.
why_it_matters: A 160-year-old private waterfront club is a niche asset, but its disposition sets a precedent for how Toledo handles historic waterfront parcels that fall into financial distress outside the formal land-bank pipeline. The Point Place location — on the Maumee River near Lake Erie — sits at the northern end of the city's waterfront story; a distress sale puts the property in the hands of whoever clears the judgment, with no guarantee of community-serving reuse. The debt balance is modest ($263K), meaning a motivated civic buyer, a preservation nonprofit, or even a club member coalition could theoretically satisfy it before the auction. If the sale proceeds, watch whether the buyer is a local operator or a passive LLC — that distinction will determine whether this becomes another Hotel Lorraine pattern or a legitimate reset.
